info.name: Weak Cipher Suites Detection
author: devsecops
info.description: A weak cipher is defined as an encryption/decryption algorithm that uses a key of insufficient length. Using an insufficient length for a key in an encryption/decryption algorithm opens up the possibility (or probability) that the encryption scheme could be broken.

info.name: Permissions Policy
author: devsecops
info.description: This template checks if the target website has a Permissions-Policy header, which allows or denies the use of browser features in a document or within any iframe elements in the document.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: artifactory.apps.bancolombia.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/34.0.1847.137 Safari/4E423F
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: close Transfer-Encoding: chunked Accept-Ranges: bytes Cache-Control: max-age=604800000 Content-Security-Policy: script-src 'self' cdn.heapanalytics.com heapanalytics.com www.google-analytics.com youtube.com www.youtube.com 'unsafe-eval' https://js.driftt.com https://widget.drift.com; frame-src youtube.com www.youtube.com js.driftt.com widget.drift.com; media-src js.driftt.com; font-src 'self' data: https://heapanalytics.com; base-uri 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://heapanalytics.com; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self' Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 Date: Thu, 04 Jan 2024 14:52:46 GMT Etag: W/"a63-17f5f2a98cf" Feature-Policy: geolocation 'none';microphone 'none';camera 'none';payment 'none' Last-Modified: Sun, 06 Mar 2022 12:18:21 GMT Referrer-Policy: no-referrer Server: Apache/2.4.51 () OpenSSL/1.0.2k-fips Vary: Accept-Encoding X-Content-Security-Policy: script-src 'self' cdn.heapanalytics.com heapanalytics.com www.google-analytics.com youtube.com www.youtube.com 'unsafe-eval' https://js.driftt.com https://widget.drift.com; frame-src youtube.com www.youtube.com js.driftt.com widget.drift.com; media-src js.driftt.com; font-src 'self' data: https://heapanalytics.com; base-uri 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://heapanalytics.com; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self' X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN X-Webkit-Csp: script-src 'self' cdn.heapanalytics.com heapanalytics.com www.google-analytics.com youtube.com www.youtube.com 'unsafe-eval' https://js.driftt.com https://widget.drift.com; frame-src youtube.com www.youtube.com js.driftt.com widget.drift.com; media-src js.driftt.com; font-src 'self' data: https://heapanalytics.com; base-uri 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://heapanalytics.com; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self' X-Xss-Protection: 1; mode=block JFrog
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/34.0.1847.137 Safari/4E423F' 'https://artifactory.apps.bancolombia.com/'

info.name: Strict Transport Security Headers
author: devsecops
info.description: The server lacks the HTTP Strict-Transport-Security header. Alternatively, the max-age value of it is too small.

Host: artifactory.apps.bancolombia.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/34.0.1847.137 Safari/4E423F
Connection: close
Accept: */*

Accept-Encoding: gzip

info.name: Strict Transport Security Headers
author: devsecops
info.description: The application does not define the security header X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies, or it has it set to an insecure value.

Host: artifactory.apps.bancolombia.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/34.0.1847.137 Safari/4E423F

info.name: Cross Origin Embedder Policy
author: devsecops
info.description:
The application has unnsafe configurations regarding the Content-Security-Policy header. This may be because:

- Header is missing from server responses.
- The header has not defined mandatory security policies.
- Defined security policies contain insecure values.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: artifactory.apps.bancolombia.com
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/34.0.1847.137 Safari/4E423F
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip

- Defined security policies contain insecure values.

info.name: Deprecated TLS Detection (TLS 1.1 or SSLv3)
author: devsecops
info.description: Both TLS 1.1 and SSLv3 are deprecated in favor of stronger encryption.
info.remediation: Update the web server's TLS configuration to disable TLS 1.1 and SSLv3.

info.name: Deprecated TLS Detection (TLS 1.1 or SSLv3)
author: devsecops
info.description: Both TLS 1.1 and SSLv3 are deprecated in favor of stronger encryption.
info.remediation: Update the web server's TLS configuration to disable TLS 1.1 and SSLv3.

info.name: Weak Cipher Suites Detection
author: devsecops
info.description: A weak cipher is defined as an encryption/decryption algorithm that uses a key of insufficient length. Using an insufficient length for a key in an encryption/decryption algorithm opens up the possibility (or probability) that the encryption scheme could be broken.
